user_prompt: Create a wall-mounted bracket with a rectangular back plate, two symmetric mounting holes, and a centered rectangular cutout.
objective: Generate an editable parametric wall-mounted bracket plate with named dimensions and validation checks.
requirements: Back plate has two symmetric mounting holes.
Back plate has a centered rectangular cutout.
assumptions: The mounting holes are centered on the vertical centerline of the plate.
Mounting holes pass fully through the back plate.
The center cutout passes fully through the back plate.
unknowns: Required load rating is not specified.

mounting_holes.reason: Example prompt includes two symmetric mounting holes.

center_cutout.reason: Example prompt includes a centered rectangular cutout.

rounded_corners.reason: Bundled example uses rounded corners as a documented default style.

edge_fillets.reason: Edge fillets are omitted unless explicitly requested.
